subtitle: North Bali's calm black-sand antidote to the party south — famous for dawn dolphin-watching boat trips whose flotillas of boats have become the beach's defining ethical problem.
spike_statement: A calm black-sand beach in north Bali whose dawn dolphin-watching tours, the whole reason people come, send dozens of boats chasing the wild pods they sell.

levers.photo_tone: calm dark-grey volcanic sand and a flat dawn Bali Sea under soft gold light, outrigger jukung boats on the water, the dolphin monument at Kalibukbuk, the quiet opposite of Bali's bright south
